headline: The square-ish phone that I wanted to love
summary: The Ikko MindOne Pro is a delightfully small phone with a square screen. Its camera flips up for selfies and can even act as a partial stand. The unique design offers interesting functionality despite its quirks.

headline: The fanfiction community is at war with AI — and itself
summary: A new fanworks movement targets authors using generative AI, causing a rift in the community. Detection methods for AI-generated content are under scrutiny and may lead to false accusations. The debate highlights broad distaste for AI tools among fanfic writers.

headline: Qi fan fan
summary: Wireless Qi chargers with integrated fans genuinely impress after initial skepticism. The active cooling system keeps phones from overheating during charging. The Kuxiu D5 Qi2.2 dock effectively demonstrates this beneficial feature.

headline: Amazon updated 2023’s Fire HD 10 tablet with 4GB of RAM
summary: Amazon quietly updated its 2023 Fire HD 10 tablet, boosting its RAM. The 32GB version now ships with 4GB of RAM, an increase from the previous 3GB. This improvement offers better performance for the budget-minded tablet.

headline: The Devil’s Rain Review
summary: Severin Films releases a 4K version of the cult classic horror film, 'The Devil's Rain'. The review explores the movie's depiction of evil materializing. It's a must-see for fans of classic horror romps.

headline: Mr. Terrific TV Show in the Works With Pilot from The Sandman Alum
summary: DC Studios is reportedly developing a TV show centered on superhero genius Mr. Terrific. A pilot episode is in the works, penned by an alum from 'The Sandman'. This spin-off will focus on Superman's brilliant side character.

headline: Supergirl Reportedly Faced Creative Differences Between DC Studios and Craig Gillespie
summary: The 'Supergirl' movie faced significant creative differences between DC Studios and director Craig Gillespie. Competing cuts of the film were reportedly tested. These issues arose just months before the movie's scheduled release.

headline: Danganronpa 2x2 Delayed to Early 2027
summary: Spike Chunsoft announced a significant delay for 'Danganronpa 2x2'. The game is now expected to launch in early 2027. Fans will have to wait longer for the anticipated title.

headline: Pubs and police brace for England-Mexico 1am kick-off after Fifa U-turn
summary: England's World Cup last-16 match against Mexico is scheduled for a 1 AM BST kick-off. Fifa reversed its decision to bring the game forward, maintaining the late time. Pubs and police are preparing for the unusual Monday morning start.

headline: Dior dress and a man of honour: What we know about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding
summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce reportedly tied the knot in New York on Friday. The wedding follows months of intense speculation about their plans. Details hint at a Dior dress and a special 'man of honour'.

headline: Starmer tells of 'intensely personal' decision to quit and warns Burnham in first interview since resigning
summary: Outgoing PM Starmer calls his decision to quit 'intensely personal' in a candid interview. He warned Andy Burnham in his first comments since resigning. Starmer described ending his political career as 'really tough'.

headline: The massive scramble behind the scenes before the new PM arrives
summary: A significant 'bunfight for jobs' is underway in Whitehall as the new PM prepares to take office. Insiders describe a massive scramble for positions behind the scenes. MPs are vying for roles as Starmer gets ready to depart.
